reviews.title: Disgusted and Apalled
reviews.text:
Such a terrible experience and mismanaged system they have. First, they are super under staffed at the reception, half the counters are unattended when there’s a line up of guests for check in. Secondly, on asking for inter connecting rooms, they checked us in to rooms that were not connected to each other saying that they’re connected to each other. Thirdly, they have just ONE KEY for all the rooms in the ENTIRE PULLMAN AND NOVOTEL HOTELS, which is absolutely ridiculous, unprofessional and unethical. There’s no privacy left, even the person at the post of housekeeping manager Mr. Ashwini or Ms. Shireen has to say that you can either keep the rooms open or closed. I have never ever seen more mismanaged and poor service at a hotel. This place probably is meant for business visitors and DEFINITELY NOT FOR FAMILIES. If they do not give keys they should have the SENSE to at least make doors which have locks inbuilt to be able to lock or open the doors as per one’s convenience. 
Also, the tub in our room was leaking. The irons in both the rooms were not working.  We needed water and glasses because in NORMAL places there’s always two sets of glasses in the room, one set of wine glasses and one set of water glasses, which were not there in the room. We had to call MULTIPLE times to get one thing done. The service is EXTREMELY slow and poor. 
This probably is the most pathetic experience I’ve had after staying at all of the hotels in Aerocity. APALLED AND DISGUSTED.

reviews.title: HORRIBLE!
reviews.positives:
The hotel is highly overrated. I’ve always stayed at Andaz and decided to try Pullman this time, but it was a huge mistake. I paid almost Rs 25,000 per night. When I went for dinner, one of the restaurants was booked for a private party, and the second one felt like a local dhaba, with staff yelling across the hall about what customers had ordered!

When I returned to my room, the card reader to unlock the door was broken. After about 10 minutes, the lights started flickering, and an hour later, the AC stopped working. They tried to fix it but couldn’t, so they moved me to a different room at 3 a.m.

Save your money and go to another hotel! I can’t understand how this place is rated as a 5-star hotel—it shouldn’t be more than 2 or 3 stars. HORRIBLE, HORRIBLE HOTEL! I will never visit again.
reviews.negatives: Train the staff! Fix the equipment. Lower you prices acc to 2-3star.

reviews.title: Inexperienced  staff
reviews.text:
Hi , 

Yesterday  i stayed in pullman Delhi aerocity. It was worst  experience  i ever had. I went for check in 9:15 pm.
It was a short stay as i had flight early in the morning  6am. 

I went for check-in, no greetings at all, for some reason they were changing staff for my check in procedure. They took nearly an hour for check in.  Check- in procedure  wasnt really good.

I was with my family and i asked them to  give me rooms that close to each other. So that i can assist  my parents . But he gave me 1 room on 3rd level 2 rooms on 4th level (so far away from each other). 

Then i have booked it for 7 people so 3 in 1 room rest 2 people in each room. Receptionist  said 3 people can share the bed. Then i said i already requested for that and paid for it. Response  wasnt satisfactory  when you pay huge amount of money for comfy stay. 

Then in my booking i have mentioned need non smoking room. As soon we entred in the room. It was stinking as i can smell that someone  had smoke inside. Then i went to manger to change my room. It took 30 mins to change it to new room.

 I 
Was getting late for my dinner. I have paid for 7 buffet plates. Then they stopped the kitchen. They said they cant cook as kitchen is closed. But manger helped us little  bit.

Then i decided, i will have some drinks bar attendant  gave me whisky . Then i ask for another serve. No body came back when i asked about the drinks they said just want to let you know its 750rs per serve. I was so embarrassed and just wanted to leave the place.

I have paid nearly  2000$ (including stay and food) but seriously  that was total waste of money. Will never recommend  to anybody, you will get much more in other hotels.

If services in 5 star hotel is like this, i wont call it 5 star. This is not my first time in hotel been many times in pullman delhi aerocity and in Australia. But definitely  this was the last time and wont recommend  anybody to stay at this hotel.

Please know that your comments have been shared with our team for immediate improvement.

I would like to extend a personal apology and hope to welcome you back.

Sincerely,

Vineet Mishra

reviews.title: Not a very accommodating space
reviews.text: We’ve stayed here before and last time it was a great experience which is why we returned less than five months later. We travel a fair amount to Delhi and had thought we could make Pullman a permanent fixture in our travels. However this time around I felt like the standard has gone way down with staff being less than accommodating and just not bothered with customer experience. We had to leave half a day earlier due to an emergency and the staff was just not willing to accommodate the request even thought we booked six days - it was a small request in good faith considering due to the nature of my health condition, I’m not very mobile and all our meals were also on the property. We were not looking for a handout, just a bit of accommodation considering we’ve spent a lot of money on the property over the last six months. Probably won’t be choosing it on trip in a couple of months which is disappointing because it really is a beautiful property. Cleaning staff and the staff handling luggage were also wonderful.

reviews.title: Mixed Bag
reviews.text:
Some of the staff is extremely helpful, others (especially at check in/transport desk) have obviously not yet been trained enough in customer service. There is still room for improvement!! The breakfast area and staff is excellent, especially the waiters who signal you that they have a speech impairment...all of them are absolutely wonderful! All the restaurants are totally overpriced and it can take forever to get an espresso. Cleaning staff wonderful...trying their best to help in any which way. Room was good value, clean and well appointed.
But the front desk staff should really make up their mind whether they are there to take care of guests who often come in tired after long flights or not. And if you are looking for a quiet place to rejuvenate and rest after a long journey this may not be the best place...the bar and buffet restaurant is blasting music...wow!

reviews.title: Room with club lounge
reviews.text: Took option with club lounge but was very disappointed that when I reviewed what was included that it listed breakfast which is not included. Also choice of beer was limited to 2 Indian beers even though a number of beers are available at other bars. Same could be said for the Saturday and Sunday brunch where there was no choice of beer and their advertised prices do not include 3 extra taxes and service charges. It stated that airport transfers are available no where does it state that it is $32AUD extra for a 480metre ride. The hotel is what you would except of a 5 star hotel but just be aware that everything is extra. We were given a 2 pm late check out which was appreciated. I got our room at a massive discount and not sure if I would have been happy with extra unknown costs if I had paid full price.

reviews.title: Room for improvement
reviews.text:
There are few things that a customer expects from a 5-star hotel. As the check-in time was 3:00 pm the reception desk was not optimally staffed, leading to a longer waiting time (in my case it was almost 10-15 min). 
Room was comfortable but there were no option to lock the bathroom from inside. It was romantic but when you are with a toddler who can open the sliding door anytime, this creates a situation.
 Bathroom was very beautiful but no bathrobe was provided, however, it was shown in the pictures. There was a table lamp which was not properly functioning and   it keeps flickering.  similarly there were no slippers. No one briefed us about the hotel also. There are more things that I am not writing but it is for sure that there is a room for improvement.
reviews.response:
Dear Bhavishya,
Thank you for your review of our hotel on this forum.
My sincere apologies for the unsatisfactory experience and inconvenience caused during your stay at the hotel in the month of April. Although we strive to provide a superior service experience for our valued patrons, in this instance we seemed to have been unable to meet your expectations. 
Please rest assured that the setbacks have been strongly highlighted to the relevant departments and corrective measures have been implemented to arrest such concerns and improve the overall guest experience. All our efforts are concentrated in preventing future occurrence.

Overall, this experience was very disappointing.

reviews.title: Ein absolut tolles Hotel !
reviews.text:
Hier stimmt alles!
Das Hotel liegt perfekt, 10 Min. mit dem Taxi zum Airport.
Zimmer sehr schön + komfortabel. 
Betten Weltklasse. 
Bäder sauber + sehr gut mit allem ausgestattet!
Tolles Gym - super Spa!
Pool… sehr laut durch viele Kinder!
Frühstück, sicherlich eines der besten Buffets in Delhi, es bleiben keine Wünsche offen! 
Sonntags bis 11.30! 
Tolles Sushi im Restaurant Honk. 
Supermarkt, Bank (im Marriott) und ATM‘s 5 Min. zu Fuss entfernt. 
Ich komme seid Jahren + werde es auch weiterhin! 
Danke Pullman Team!

reviews.text:

一万円を両替したかったのですが、少額と言われ換金してもらえませんでした。
また、Uberへ支払うたもに500ルピーを崩そうとしたら200しか戻って来ないと言われ、交渉しました。こんなところがガッカリです。
primeビデオの使い方も聞いても教えて貰えないし、設備は良いけど他は微妙でした。

reviews.text:
침구류가 매우 편안하였다.  

가격대비 룸이나 화장실이 매우 만족
객실 내 웰컴 케이크로 초코케이크 한 판을 주는 배포!ㅎㅎ 한 조각도 아니고..잘못 배달 온 건 줄 알고 전화해서 물어봤다.

객실은 풀뷰였는데 뷰도 훌륭한 편. 
로비층 의 컨시어지 직원/체크인 도와주는 직원들
매우 친절, 그 외의 로비에 있던 직원들은 구글에
본인 이름 써서 리뷰 남겨달라고 ㅋㅋ계속 졸랐다.

아래층에 있는 honk라는  퓨전 아시아 식당은
분위기가 고급지긴하나 가격 대비 음식 맛이..
지못미... 충격의 맛과 양의 똠양꿍. 
아보카도 참치 샐러드는 맛있었다. ㅋㅋ

전반적으로 만족할만한 스테이였다.
근처의 할리데이인도 자봤는데 그 곳보단
여기가 확연히 여러면에서 좋았다.

reviews.title: While a bit expensive, this was a very pleasant hotel. Close to the airport. Good breakfast.
reviews.positives: I might have been lucky, I was upgraded magically on checking in. The room, the facilities, and the hotel itself was really good. I had read so many horror stories about hotels in Delhi that I opted for what I consider to have been an expensive choice. That said, I felt it was reasonable value and there's no way you'd get a hotel of this quality for that price in Europe. It is in the Aerocity, where the big airport hotels are. It took about 10-15 mins in a taxi.
reviews.negatives: I checked in after midnight. I wanted nothing more than to get to bed. There was only one person in front of me, but it took some time to check-in (about 15mins). I will say however that as soon as people started joining the queue behind me, some extra staff jumped into action.
